propositions: No CI workflow enables pip dependency caching, so every job re-downloads and rebuilds the heavy dependency stack.
Enabling pip caching roughly halves install time by avoiding re-download of project dependencies.
Add cache: 'pip' and cache-dependency-path: pyproject.toml to every actions/setup-python step that installs project deps across all workflows.
The cache is keyed on pyproject.toml content so a dependency change invalidates the cache automatically; a cache miss behaves as today.
YAML must remain valid and each install step unchanged apart from the two added cache inputs.
A repeat CI run over an unchanged pyproject.toml should log a pip cache hit.
